items.title: Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty hints at positive start amid mixed cues; Asian markets extend gains
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: GIFT Nifty was trading at 26,050.5 levels, up by 89 points, indicating a positive start for Indian markets amid mixed global cues

items.title: Buy NTPC, CPSE ETF; Nifty resistance seen at 26,000, says HDFC Securities
items.description: Technical analyst Vinay Rajani of HDFC Securities expects NTPC and CPSEETF to rally to ₹392.50 and ₹111 on the upside, respectively.

items.title: Nifty, Bank Nifty strategy; 3 stocks recommendations today by Motilal Oswal
items.description: Chandan Taparia of Motilal Oswal Financial Services recommends to buy Tata Steel, Bajaj Auto and DMart on February 11, 2026; here's why.

items.title: 'Surprised by market reaction to Kevin Warsh's nomination to the US Fed'
items.description: The dollar, said Aditya Bhave, senior US economist at BofA Global Research, will most likely remain the world's reserve currency.

items.title: Britannia gains 5% post Q3 results; Nomura revives 'top-pick' status
items.description: The buying on the counter came after Britannia released its Q3FY26 numbers on Tuesday, after market hours.

items.title: MSCI Feb rejig: Aditya Birla Capital, L&T Finance added; IRCTC excluded
items.description: According to an official statement, Aditya Birla Capital and L&T Finance will be added to the MSCI Standard Index, while Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) will be removed

items.title: Stocks to Watch today: Apollo Hospitals, Britannia, RIL, BHEL, Tata Motors
items.description: Stocks to watch today, Wednesday, February 11, 2026: Apollo Hospitals Enterprises, Britannia Industries, Bharat Heavy Electricals, Tata Motors shares are likely to be in focus on Wednesday.
